name: Cider Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Stew beef, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, and pepper. Dredge beef in the mixture.
2. In a heavy saucepan, brown beef in oil.
3. Add cider, water, vinegar, and thyme; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 1 hour and 45 minutes or until beef is falling apart tender. (Add more liquid during this time if necessary, using a ratio of 2 parts cider to 1 part water.)
5. Add the carrots, celery, potato, and onion. Return to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 45 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Serves 4
